title: Foxes Eat Eggs
description: A simple quilt mod that allows foxes to pickup and eat eggs
body: **Foxes Eat Eggs** is a simple Quilt Mod, which adds the ability to foxes to eat eggs they pick up, similar to other food items. That's it. The mod does not give them special effects when eating the eggs, or heal them or anything. It just lets them eat eggs, because foxes do that in real life, but not here (Don't ask me why... Mojang decided to do it like that).
